sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Current state:
# - Red block at [24,18]-[29,21] (moved from original position)
# - Dark red at [30,18]-[33,21]
# - Blue outline at [34,8]-[37,11]
# - Green at [40,10]-[41,11]
# - Gray box at [30,8]-[33,11]
# - Yellow at [20,24]-[21,25]
# Timer: 59

# Try clicking on red block again (it's at [24,18]-[29,21])
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 27, 'col': 19}])
print(f"Click red block: board_changed={last_action_result.get('board_changed')}, gameplay_changed={last_action_result.get('gameplay_changed')}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

if not last_action_result.get('level_completed'):
    # Check state
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    print("Left panel objects:")
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        b = n['boundary']
        r1, c1 = min(p[0] for p in b), min(p[1] for p in b)
        r2, c2 = max(p[0] for p in b), max(p[1] for p in b)
        if c2 < 32 and n['color'] not in ['c', 'B', 'G']:
            print(f"  color={n['color']}, size={n['pixels']}, bbox=[{r1},{c1}]-[{r2},{c2}]")
    
    # Check white bar
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'W':
            b = n['boundary']
            r1 = min(p[0] for p in b)
            if r1 >= 60:
                print(f"White bar: size={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
